payload.answer: Recall included mem_new because it is the active/current memory matching Sam from Goldman. It excluded mem_old because mem_old has been superseded, so returning it as a current fact would risk showing stale information. The correct behavior is to cite or return the newer replacement memory and suppress the older superseded version unless explicitly debugging history.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for the resolved Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.
